params.TriggerDescription: When CARDNAME enters, you may pay {2}{R} any number of times. When you pay this cost one or more times, put that many +1/+1 counters on CARDNAME, then exile up to that many target instant and/or sorcery cards with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard and copy them. You may cast any number of the copies without paying their mana costs.
